YOUR TASK:
T4: M2-CRUD-API — TaskService + TaskController + Exception Handling

Build the Task CRUD service, controller, remaining DTOs, and global exception handler.

Acceptance criteria (M2 spec, 16 ACs):
- AC1: POST /api/tasks with valid token + title/description/priority → 201 + full task object
- AC2: POST without priority → default MEDIUM
- AC3: POST without/empty title → 400
- AC4: GET /api/tasks/{id} existing → 200
- AC5: GET /api/tasks/{id} non-existent → 404
- AC6: PUT /api/tasks/{id} → 200 + updatedAt updated
- AC7: DELETE /api/tasks/{id} → 204, soft-deleted
- AC8: Soft-deleted NOT in list
- AC9: GET soft-deleted → 404
- AC10: GET /api/tasks default pagination (page=0, size=20, createdAt desc)
- AC11: keyword search (case-insensitive title)
- AC12: priority filter
- AC13: page=1&size=5 correct pagination
- AC14: No token → 401
- AC15: title >200 → 400
- AC16: description >5000 → 400

IMPLEMENTATION NOTES:
- TaskService: inject TaskRepository. Methods: create(CreateTaskRequest, Long userId), getById(Long id), update(Long id, UpdateTaskRequest), softDelete(Long id), list(String keyword, String priority, Pageable pageable). Throw ResourceNotFoundException (or similar) for not found/soft-deleted.
- TaskController: @RestController @RequestMapping("/api/tasks"). Extract userId from SecurityContext principal (Long). Use @Valid on request bodies. POST returns 201 (ResponseEntity.status(201)), DELETE returns 204.
- UpdateTaskRequest: title (required 1-200), description (optional max 5000), priority (optional enum)
- PageResponse<T>: generic, with content, page, size, totalElements, totalPages. Build from Spring's Page<T>.
- GlobalExceptionHandler: @RestControllerAdvice. Handle MethodArgumentNotValidException→400, ResourceNotFoundException→404, DuplicateException→409. Error format: {status:int, message:string, errors?:string[]}

[SECTION] Project Overview
[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow M1 (Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) — full-stack from entity to frontend
[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + Java 17 + H2 in-memory + JPA + Spring Security + JJWT 0.12.5 | Vue 3.4 + Pinia 2.1 + axios + vue-router + Vite 5 + Vitest + TypeScript | stateless JWT auth | soft-delete pattern | state machine in enum
[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, lowercase packages (com.taskflow.*) | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods, kebab-case file events | TS: PascalCase interfaces, camelCase fields
[CONSTRAINTS] M4/M5 not implemented — M6 uses placeholder for assignee/tags | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | JWT secret in application.yml | all /api/** require auth except /api/auth/** and /h2-console/**
[SHARED] config/SecurityConfig.java | entity/Task.java | service/TaskService.java | controller/TaskController.java | exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java

[SECTION] Standards
[SOURCE] none
[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code

[SECTION] Specs
[SPEC] id=S1 | name=M1-Authentication | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
[SPEC] id=S2 | name=M2-Task-CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
[SPEC] id=S3 | name=M3-Task-State-Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
[SPEC] id=S4 | name=M6-Task-List-Page | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md

[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
[DEP] T1 → T2 → T4 → T5 (backend chain)
[DEP] T3 → T4 (entity feeds into service)
[DEP] T6 → T7 (frontend chain)
[DEP] T1,T3,T6 are independent (wave 1, max 3 concurrent)

[SECTION] Execution Strategy
[STRATEGY] parallel-per-task | max-concurrent=3
[WAVE] 1: T1(M1-Foundation), T3(M2+M3-Entity), T6(M6-Frontend-Infra) — all independent
[WAVE] 2: T2(M1-Auth-API) after T1, T7(M6-Frontend-UI) after T6
[WAVE] 3: T4(M2-CRUD-API) after T1+T3
[WAVE] 4: T5(M3-Status-API) after T4

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>3.2.3</version>
        <relativePath/>
    </parent>

    <groupId>com.taskflow</groupId>
    <artifactId>taskflow-backend</artifactId>
    <version>0.1.0</version>
    <name>taskflow-backend</name>
    <description>TaskFlow Backend - Spring Boot 3 + H2</description>

    <properties>
        <java.version>17</java.version>
        <jjwt.version>0.12.5</jjwt.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Spring Boot Starters -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- H2 Database -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.h2database</groupId>
            <artifactId>h2</artifactId>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- JWT -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Testing -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>
